name: Redemption Seeker Liu
personality: tormented, seeks to understand and atone for past sins through karma study
speech: quiet, intense, speaks about guilt and causation
relationship_to_wanglin: neutral-desperate — seeks understanding of own karma
initiation_lines: I came here because I heard the crystals can show you what you have done. I need to see it.
The Corpse Yin Sect trades in bodies. We trade in consequences. Both are currencies of death. Ours is more honest.

A cultivator from the Heng Yue Sect came seeking redemption for killing a fellow disciple. The crystals showed him nothing. He left relieved. I think the crystals were showing him that nothing needed forgiveness.
Books and experience bottles. I study karma theory. Perhaps understanding will bring peace.

sect_tasks.name: Karma Theory Study
sect_tasks.description: Liu needs books and experience bottles to study karma theory and seek understanding.

sect_tasks.name: Crystal Meditation Aid
sect_tasks.description: Glowstone and emeralds help Liu maintain focus during long crystal meditation sessions.
